targets.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iceberg.retail.delivery WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE delivery_status='delivered' AND actual_delivery_date <= estimated_delivery_date) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE delivery_status='delivered'), 0) FROM iceberg.retail.delivery WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT AVG(actual_delivery_date - order_timestamp) FILTER (WHERE delivery_status='delivered') * 24 FROM iceberg.retail.delivery WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_delayed=true) FROM iceberg.retail.delivery WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT CASE WHEN is_delayed THEN 'Delayed' ELSE 'On Time' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM iceberg.retail.delivery WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY status

SELECT carrier, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_delayed=false AND delivery_status='delivered') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE delivery_status='delivered'), 0) AS on_time_rate FROM iceberg.retail.delivery WHERE DATE(created_at) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY carrier ORDER BY on_time_rate
SELECT delay_reason, COUNT(*) AS count FROM iceberg.retail.delivery WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND is_delayed=true GROUP BY delay_reason
